name: Klodsy
description: « Transform your physical wardrobe into a digital platform with virtual fitting thanks to AI that shows you how outfits really look on you. Upload your clothes or choose from the catalog, automatically generate stylish combinations, and more

name: GLM-Image
description: « An open-source AI image generator with 16 billion parameters that excels at displaying text. This model also supports image editing, style transfer, identity preservation, and multi-subject consistency

name: Remove Watermarks MarkGone
description: « Quickly remove unwanted watermarks from your photos and images online. You can also erase text, logos, or distracting objects without altering the rest of your image

name: AVCLabs Video Blur AI
description: « Automatically blur faces, license plates, backgrounds, or remove unwanted objects from your videos using AI. This editor can process multiple elements simultaneously and intelligently restore deleted areas

name: ChatGPT Health
description: « A specialized version that helps interpret medical records, prepare for consultations, and find fitness advice by connecting to Apple Health. The assistant answers medical questions from over 200 million users. Available on the waitlist

name: WhatsApp Schedule Message
description: « Schedule WhatsApp messages in advance for a specific date and time so you never forget to send reminders or important announcements. Add multiple recipients, create recurring messages, and organize your communications more easily

name: MakeBestMusic
description: « Generate music tracks from a prompt or lyrics, with a choice of styles, tempo, and instruments. You can also load an existing track to remix it, extract stems, or remove vocals

name: PXZ Image Generator
description: « Generate images from text or photos by choosing from several styles and output formats. This AI tool provides adjustments to guide composition, colors, or overall mood, You can create AI images with models like Nano Banana, Seedream, or Flux

name: Visual Field Test
description: « Test your peripheral vision directly online with a series of interactive grids that assess the extent and responsiveness of your visual field. At the end of the test, you will receive feedback and a visualization of your results

name: Colorart
description: « Create coloring pages from a simple idea or your own photos, with detailed outlines ready to print. This platform also offers options to improve the quality of your images

name: Final Round AI
description: « Prepare for every stage of an interview with realistic simulations, a database of questions for each role, and a tool that suggests structured responses. The service also offers optimized resume creation, cover letters, and performance analysis

name: BeautyPlus Image Enhancer
description: « Improve the quality of your photos online with automatic adjustments that enhance sharpness, detail, and lighting. Quickly correct visual imperfections to achieve more balanced photos

name: Syllaby.io
description: « Create faceless videos with AI avatars and voices. This AI can write the script and generate a complete video from a simple idea. You can then schedule publication on multiple social networks from an integrated calendar
